plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous LLM-research loop adapted from Karpathy's autoresearch for real ML codebases (editable-install Python projects, accelerate / torchrun launchers, wandb metrics). Two skills — setup and run — plus an ar helper CLI that owns launch orchestration, wandb binding, atomic checkpoint commit, process-tree-aware timeout, and chain-mode transitions, so the main Claude session stays context-light across hundreds–thousands of iterations.
